name: University of Limerick
content:
I studied abroad here for a year. It’s generally a pretty nice campus, with nice students and a good balance of study rigor and student life. I enjoyed my time there.
The university is connected to the city through the river walk, which runs along the river Shannon. The river walk is a nice place to go for a walk or a run. There are also footpaths that extend behind Thomond Village that are a nice place to go for a walk. Be careful to not become distracted, as this path leads to unknowingly wandering to Ardnacrusha.
There is a swim spot along the river Shannon by the university, colloquially known as Killmurray Beach. The safety of swimming in the river is a debated topic.
